description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Request a residential rooftop solar quote for a 6 kW system using any panels rated at least 4 stars for ZIP code 94110, choosing a preferred site visit date in June 2026.

tasks.instruction: Select a roof plus solar package under $25,000 that uses asphalt shingles and at least a 5 kW solar system, add an attic insulation add-on, and proceed to the booking summary.

target_names: 5 kW Asphalt Roof + Solar Budget Package
5 kW Asphalt Roof + Solar Value Package
6 kW Asphalt Roof + Solar Standard Package

tasks.instruction: For an 8 kW solar system costing $24,000, compare a 20-year loan and a 20-year lease in the financing tool, select the option with the lower total paid over 20 years, and start the application for that plan.

tasks.instruction: Request a consultation for a commercial solar carport at the nearest available service location to ZIP code 85001 for a parking lot with 50 spaces.

tasks.instruction: Using a $180 monthly electric bill for ZIP code 78701, choose a solar plus battery bundle estimated to offset at least 90% of the bill and proceed to that bundle’s quote page.

target_names: 7.5 kW Solar + 15 kWh Battery High-Offset Bundle
8 kW Solar + 20 kWh Premium Backup Bundle
5 kW Solar + 10 kWh TOU Saver Bundle

tasks.instruction: Request installation of two home battery units by selecting any model with at least 10 kWh usable capacity and a rating of 4 or more stars, for a project in ZIP code 95014 indicating you already have solar.

tasks.instruction: Enroll in an annual maintenance plan under $400 per year that includes both roof inspection and solar panel cleaning, choose annual billing, and schedule the first visit within the next 60 days.
